actions.name: Create PR
actions.prompt: DIRECT IMPLEMENTATION: first run('make absorb-sgai'); store the git path (by querying jj git root) into the environment variable GIT_DIR, and using GH, make a draft PR for the commit at @ (jj); CRITICAL: commit message, the PR title and body, must adhere to the standard of previous commits - update all of these if necessary; once you are done, using bash(`open`), open the PR for me. REMEMBER: 'GOALS' must never be the used commit message or PR title prefix; when the PR already exists, make sure you update its body and title with the latest updates; store the PR information (like URL) into .sgai/PR_INFO
actions.description: Create a draft pull request from current changes

actions.name: Upstream Sync
actions.prompt: DIRECT IMPLEMENTATION: `jj git fetch --all-remotes`; rebase against main@origin (`jj rebase -d main@origin`), fix merge conflicts, and push (make sure you push onto the branch of the PR, if a PR already exists for this workspace)
actions.description: Fetch and rebase against upstream main branch
